name: Recipe Research Agent
description: Finds, adapts, and nutritionally analyses recipes from public sources. Returns structured recipe data; reports an explicit error part when a source is unreachable.

extensions.description: Optional negotiation of metric vs imperial units in nutrition DataParts.

skills.name: Find recipes
skills.description: Searches public recipe sources for dishes matching cuisine, ingredient, and dietary constraints. Fails with a structured error when no source responds.
examples: Find three vegan ramen recipes under 30 minutes.

skills.name: Adapt a recipe
skills.description: Rewrites a recipe for a dietary constraint or serving count, preserving technique steps and flagging substitutions it is not confident about.
examples: Make this lasagna gluten-free for six people.

skills.name: Nutrition analysis
skills.description: Computes per-serving macros and allergens for a recipe as a structured DataPart. Unknown ingredients are listed explicitly rather than estimated silently.
examples: Estimate the macros for this recipe at four servings.
